guide:
# Level 1

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Go to Tailor Tavin and get a Tattered Robe for free.

---

# Level 2

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Grear sends you to Spiritmaster Zake who binds you and sends you to Coachman Rizkar.

---

# Level 3

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Grear wants you to head out of town, kill ants, and return with two cracked ant pincers.

---

# Level 4

**Starting NPC:** Bal Noonittle 
Bal will make you a new staff if you bring him the following items:
- Gear Wheel - Purchase from Merchant Samwe
- Meat Chunk - Purchase from Merchant Folsop
- Sliver of Snake Meat
- Fractured Firefly Thorax

---

# Level 5

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Hosrottle sends you to get a stunned mindwhipper. Head out the west gate, turn south. Run along the hill until you enter Klick'Anon (SW); you will see a beehive-like structure, surrounded by mindwhippers (CONs Red). May need to kill a few.

---

# Level 7

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Talk to Grear to get the quest. He tells you he needs to pay off some trolls for some work done. He sends you to the waysender to be sent to Freeport. To find the waysender, go out the false wall and make a right past the lava pit. On the other side of the lava, there is a tunnel. Go down to find the waysender.

You are now going to Freeport. Sign the coach while you are here. Then go back to the dock you showed up on and talk to the guy all the way at the end. He will send you to Hazinak. Once in Haz, go into the walled area and make a left; keep going left through two doors and you will see a coachman. Sign here too. Behind Coachman Drooga you will see a green tent. The troll you need is inside. Talk to him and he will give you something to give to Grear. Go back out to the dock and use the waysender on the same dock to go back to Klick and turn in your report.

---

# Level 10

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Speak to Grear, and he sends you to visit Dragoon X'Talin. To find X'Talin, go out the west gate. Follow the mountain range westerly to the river and swim down it. You will eventually come to a tower on your left. The Dragoon is in the top. Talk to him and he will ask you to kill tomb rats and bring back a sigil. To get to the tomb rats, go back to the river and continue swimming down. You will find another tower on your right that is covered in tomb rats. Kill until you find a sigil. Bring this back to X'Talin.

He will then tell you it belongs to Arzen and ask you to kill him. To get to Arzen, go down the tower and head up the hill you see when you come out the door (it's directly behind the tower). At the top you will get a pop-up asking to shout his name; do so. Arzen appears coming up the hill. Kill him and take the paper you find back to X'Talin. The Dragoon tells you what a good gnome you are and sends you back to Grear.

Grear wants you to go find Guryon and get the collar off his dog. Run back to the river and swim down past the Dragoon and the tomb rat towers. A bit further down you will see a green tent on the right. Run around this area until a pop-up appears. If it says they aren't there, leave a little distance and keep coming back until they appear. Once they appear, be sneaky and kill the dog, Grim, outside. If you're lucky, you will not aggro the humanoids. Take the collar back to Grear.

---

# Level 13

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Speak with Grear once again and he starts talking about dark elves. You must go to Neriak. To get to Neriak, go to the river and swim down it until you get to an area with a red tent on the right and fungus cockroaches on the left. Head east from here. Eventually you will see it in the distance. Outside Neriak you will see a small camp. This is where the coachman and Captain V'Ekelos are.

Sign the coach and go into the green tent at the end. V'Ekelos wants you to go inside Neriak and do an errand for a man in a bar. To find the bar, go into Neriak and when you get to the main hall (right after the bridge) make a right through the doorway. Enter the next room and there will be a big yellowish tavern. Talk to the guy at the back; he will want you to kill tavern rats. You need to kill the "tavern rat breeder" and bring its tail back to him. The placeholder for this rat is just outside the last room on the bottom.

He then sends you back outside to the Captain. Next you get to go to Freeport. V'Ekelos wants you to buy him some nightshade from Merchant Gilgash. You can find Gilgash in the big building by the docks; he's in the bottom part. Take this back to the captain. Now he tells you some sob story and wants you to kill Helthea at Pilgrims Inn. Coach back to Freeport. Go out the North Gate and follow the road north; it winds through the desert and then the area turns green. The path looks like it's about to split; take the right-hand path and you will come across an Inn. Walk up to the doorway and a pop-up will appear. Then Helthea appears. She won't aggro you until you hit her. Kill her and take the proof back to Captain V'Ekelos in Neriak.

---

# Level 15

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
Grear is sending you to Captain V'Ekelos for another quest. V'Ekelos babbles something about some hatestone and wants you to go talk to the Ghostly Mage to find out where it is.

Lore on Ghostly Mage: Zelthil J'Narus utterly annihilated a mage called Surxal, and Surxal's spirit roams the Duelers Crest in Collonridge Cemetery. Known as the "Ghostly Mage," this spirit is bound to do the will of J'Narus.

To find this mage, go west from the tent with the captain, cross the river, go past the red tent with Jarek and keep an eye out for a big hill on the right. Go up this hill and you will see many undead. Look for a big white ghost. Talk to the Ghostly Mage (don't attack, he's Level 35) and he will tell you the hatestone is on Croc Island in Freeport.

Coach to Freeport. To get to Croc Island, follow the shore south until you get to the Whale Bones. Look west; that island is where you want to be. I recommend using invisibility. Run around the southern side of the island. You should see a big conical rock. Around this you will get a message that a guy named Croc probably has the hatestone. You need to go to Highpass to meet an old friend to coerce Croc out of his hidey hole.

There is no really easy fast way to get to Highpass the first time unless you know a high-level wizard, so you have to run. If you go west from Freeport, you will eventually come across a large mountain in the Tomb of Kings area. Follow this north and go around it to the other side. Start heading back south. You will need to go southwest a little ways until you get to Bastable Village zone. Once there, head west. You should find a road that leads to Highpass. Sign the coach. Talk to Foonklim upstairs; he will want 600 tunar to draw out Croc. Pay him and he will tell you to meet him at the Whale Bones in Freeport. Coach back to Freeport and meet him at the Whale Bones. He will slowly swim out to the island and taunt Croc into coming out of his house. You will most likely need help to kill Croc. Once you have the hatestone, take it back to Captain V'Ekelos. He then sends you back to Grear.

---

# Level 20

**Starting NPC:** Grear Hosrottle 
1. The Dark Elves are asking for help again. Travel to Fort Seriak and speak with Denouncer S'Kor. He sends you to kill Ghoul Captain (CONs DB) on the island in the center of Lake Nerius. The Ghoul Captain walks a path between Castle and dock. Kill and loot the quest items; you may need to kill several times for the needed loot to drop. Return to Denouncer T'Skor.
2. Talk to Elder Gregor at Collonridge Cemetery. He's located at the top of the first tower when you walk in the front door. Invis and wait for Gregor. There are three DB skeletons and a whole bunch of different Elders.
3. Elder Gregor sends you to kill the Elder of Hodstock (CONs Yel). Hodstock is in the western part of Hodstock & Tembly. Kill, loot record, return to Elder Gregor.
4. Return to Castle Felstar and kill Captain Holberg (CONs DB). He is a trigger spawn and shows up when you walk in the right spot.
5. Return to Denouncer T'Skor.
